ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pos_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each POS tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the POS tag (e.g., ADJ, NOUN, VERB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the POS tag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the POS tag (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "morphology" (
  "morphology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each morphological feature */,
  "fine_grained_tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fine-grained tag the morphological feature belongs to */,
  "morphology_name" TEXT /* Name of the morphological feature (e.g., Hyph, Degree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the morphological feature */,
  "morph_type" TEXT /* Type of morphological feature (e.g., inflectional, derivational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("morphology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree of comparison */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the POS tag the degree of comparison belongs to */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree of comparison (e.g., pos, comp, sup) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the degree of comparison */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree of comparison (e.g., positive, comparative, superlative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES pos_tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "pos_tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the POS tag of the word */,
  "fine_grained_tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fine-grained tag of the word */,
  "morphology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the morphological feature of the word */,
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the degree of comparison of the word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word itself */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the word */,
  "lemma" TEXT /* Base or root form of the word (lemma) */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the word in the corpus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_morphology_id FOREIGN KEY ("morphology_id") REFERENCES morphology ("morphology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_degree_id FOREIGN KEY ("degree_id") REFERENCES degrees ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_pos_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("pos_tag_id") REFERENCES pos_tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentences" (
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* The sentence itself */,
  "word_ids" TEXT /* List of word IDs that make up the sentence */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the sentence belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentence was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_word_ids FOREIGN KEY ("word_ids") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "project_ids" TEXT /* List of project IDs the user is assigned to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_project_ids FOREIGN KEY ("project_ids") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the report belongs to */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the POS tag the report is about */,
  "fine_grained_tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fine-grained tag the report is about */,
  "word_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the word in the project */,
  "sentence_count" INTEGER /* Number of sentences in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES pos_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
